name: coverage_and_table
input_text:
1 Introduction
The task is to produce traceable paper notes.

2 Method
The harness stores a grounding map and agent trace.

3 Results
Table 1 reports pass rates for three golden cases.
expected_claims: The harness stores a grounding map and agent trace.
Table 1 reports pass rates for three golden cases.
forbidden_claims: The system uses human annotation for every paper.
